overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character in a green Celtic-patterned cloak exploring the interior of a rustic medieval house. The character moves continuously from a cozy lamp-lit living room through a stone-walled kitchen area to a corner with mounted weapons.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy living room with vintage leather sofa

events.description: character begins walking forward from stationary position toward the doorway

agents.ego_description: standing in the living room then beginning to walk toward the doorway on the right

entered.detail: vertical wooden plank wall with three framed artworks hanging on it
brown vintage-style tufted leather sofa with a blanket draped over the arm
ornate table lamp with stained glass shade emitting warm light
three framed pictures including a butterfly specimen display
stack of chopped firewood on the floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rustic living room with warm lighting from a stained glass lamp. The character, wearing a green hooded cloak, stands near a brown leather sofa against wooden plank walls adorned with framed artwork. After a brief pause, the character begins walking toward a doorway leading to another room.

scene_state.functional_zone: kitchen area with stone fireplace and mantel

events.description: character passes through doorway from wooden-paneled living room into stone-walled kitchen area

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway into a room with a stone fireplace and wooden mantelpiece

entered.detail: rough stone wall with a fireplace and wooden mantelpiece holding various bottles
wooden shelf above fireplace holding glass bottles and candles
several glass bottles and a candelabra on the mantelpiece
small window letting in natural daylight
lit iron lantern hanging from ceiling beam in the doorway ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a doorway into a kitchen area characterized by a rough stone fireplace wall with a wooden mantel holding bottles and candles. Natural light enters through a small window on the right. An iron hanging lantern is visible ahead in the next doorway as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage corner with weapon rack between two doors

agents.ego_description: approaching a corner with a weapon rack mounted on the wall between two wooden doors

entered.detail: wooden rack mounted on wall holding several spears and polearms
closed wooden door with iron handle on the left side
closed wooden door with iron handle on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker corner of the house featuring a weapon rack mounted on the wall between two closed wooden doors. The iron lantern seen earlier is now closer overhead. The stone fireplace and mantel disappear from view as the character focuses on the weapon display ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic medieval home, transitioning from a warm, lamp-lit living room into a dim, stone-walled interior. It begins beside a brown leather sofa and wooden plank walls illuminated by a stained glass lamp, before the character in the green hooded cloak walks toward an adjacent room. As the character passes through the doorway, the environment shifts to a kitchen area defined by a rough stone fireplace and natural light streaming from a small side window. The scene then moves forward past a wooden mantel and toward an iron hanging lantern, eventually entering a darker corner of the house. The stone walls give way to a weapon rack mounted between two closed wooden doors as the camera focuses on the armory display.
